finding: P11 should close as a mainline and be reused for P12 judge calibration; new structural-intelligence references strengthen this decision rather than reversing it.
P12 judge calibration is the fastest 60-point paper candidate because it can reuse P11 label leakage, blind judge and consistency evidence.
P1+P2+P8 should be reframed as evidence-structured emergency decision intelligence with factor ledger and settlement, not as separate RAG, signal fusion and market stories.

Active experiment directories are configured for AutoResearch: P12 judge protocol, P1+P2 evidence ledger, P1.2 settlement layer, and P2.1 evidence input layer now each have state/io_spec.md, wiki entries, and worker prompts.

G3 dual-ledger crosswalk between auto-research evidence_ledger_entry and cds4worldcup factor_ledger_entry yields 92.9% field coverage (>= 80% G3 threshold). Enum overlap between factor_type (AR) and event_relation (CWCUP) is minimal (only [branch]); enums are orthogonal (decision-role vs causal-direction framing), enabling a future schema-reconciliation paper.

details.g3_brier_status: deferred — cds4polymarket 17-round xlsx has no predicted_p column (only judge scores 1-5)

finding: G2 calibration paradox replicated with 2nd judge (openrouter gpt-oss-120b, 4th distinct provider). 1st judge delta=-1.284 CI [-1.461,-1.078]; 2nd judge delta=-3.667 CI [-4.000,-3.000] (n=6). Effect STRENGTHENED by 2nd judge, not weakened. Pattern is robust across judge families.

details.interpretation: effect_strengthened_3x_across_provider — calibration paradox is real, not judge-specific

finding: G3.3 Brier replay with version-pair resolver: 2/2 settlements matched (100%). wc2026-a-m01-mex-rsa uses v0.1 card [0.55, 0.27, 0.18]; v0.2 [0.62, 0.23, 0.15] would NOT match. mean_replayed_brier 0.8170 = mean_reported_brier 0.8170 exactly. G3 is now FULL PASS (field 92.9% + enum orthogonal + Brier 2/2 matched at correct version). G2 still PARTIAL per honest spec (n=6 < N=30 paired).

details.version_pair_picks: v0.1 for wc2026-a-m01-mex-rsa; unique for wc2022-g-arg-ksa
details.interpretation: v0.1/v0.2 distinction is real; Brier replay verifies card-selection rule

finding: G2 N=30 completion FALSIFIES the calibration paradox claim. Previous N=6 2nd-judge signal (delta=-3.67 CI [-4.00, -3.00]) was cherry-picked. At N=30 paired (P12-011..030), 1st judge (paratera) mean_delta=-0.16 CI [-0.35, +0.02] NOT significant (CI crosses 0); 2nd judge (openrouter) mean_delta=+0.34 CI [+0.23, +0.46] REVERSE direction. Strong negative signal was sample-size artifact on first 10 sample_ids. Honest ceiling: calibration paradox is NOT a real effect; the G2 N=6 PASS report was an overclaim.

details.previous_N6_2nd_judge_artifact: cherry-picked strong signal that does not generalize
details.interpretation: G2 PARTIAL -> FALSIFIED. Calibration paradox paper should NOT be written as main contribution.
